error_signature: new line character '\n' not rendering as new line
title: New line character not rendering in Mermaid output
symptom: The Mermaid notation output contains escaped new line characters '\n' that do not render as actual line breaks in the preview.
not_this_if: Output is correctly formatted without escaped characters
root_cause: The Mermaid output is using escaped new line characters, which are not interpreted as actual line breaks in the rendering context. This often occurs when the output is generated programmatically and retains escape sequences.
fix_steps: Use the JavaScript function `replace(/\\n/g, '\n')` to replace escaped new line characters with actual new lines.
Run the modified output through the Mermaid preview again.
agent_instruction: Apply the JavaScript replace function to convert escaped new lines to actual new lines.
